BLOCKED — Missing required geography resolution

LIVE = data present; STUB = empty/placeholder; MISSING_SOURCE = source not available.

Next actions

  • Fix canon coverage: ensure H3_XWALK_6810_CANON covers deal geography, or use alternate CBSA/ZIP resolver (Census TIGER / Overture boundary).
  • Enrich Anchor deals table with CBSA/ZIP at ingest (geocode + resolve once at write time).
  • Add fallback resolver path: lat/lon → CBSA via polygon containment (Census ZCTA + CBSA shapes) when canon misses.

Do not generate a tear sheet PDF until stop_ship passes and coverage is acceptable.
